title: feat: add p0 admin dry-run approval gate
goal: Add local/internal admin approval and rejection gate for reaction dispatch dry-run boundary metadata without external execution.

risks.mitigation: Handlers only write local approval metadata and safe audit metadata; tests assert no reaction, overlay, external outbox, IRIS Core, VOXWEAVE, TTS, Live2D, renderer, OBS, WebSocket, or adapter execution.
risks.risk: Approval gate accidentally executes adapter or downstream runtime work.

risks.mitigation: Approval re-checks dry-run status, candidate validation, adapter allowlist, external delivery, adapter execution, and dispatch count before writing approval metadata.
risks.risk: Unsafe dry-run context is approved after state drift.

risks.mitigation: Responses and audit metadata expose only IDs, statuses, reason codes, timestamps, and counters; tests assert forbidden raw strings are absent.
risks.risk: Raw message, payload, wallet, secret, private URL, adapter URL, webhook URL, header, or token exposure.

risks.mitigation: Refresh PR evidence after PR creation, then confirm same-head CI, contracts, quality-gate, and safe artifact.
risks.risk: Committed local evidence must be refreshed with PR current-head GitHub run and artifact IDs.
